properties.Observation: The first part of the canal remains a natural canal, while about twenty acres of paddy fields are cultivated, and the lower parts have been concreted.
properties.Description:
Planting Trees Along the Canal

Vegetative cover improving around the river bank with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and planting at 3.5m x 3.5 m grid interval
